      • EMI options may be available from other banks on payments page based on the total order amount. To know more about EMI offers (including No-cost EMI and bank discounts), click here

      • For Axis Bank, the processing fee will be INR 599 for transactions greater than or equal to INR 50000. Amazon does not charge any fee for your orders on EMI (including No-cost-EMI). However, your Bank may charge a processing fee. Please check with your bank for charges. Know more

      • ←

      • →
      • NAKPRO PLATINUM WHEY PROTEIN is 100% Imported Whey Protein Isolate supplement powder and delivers 28g of protein per 29g serving size. Protein makes an essential component of your diet. Gain lean muscles like never before, with NAKPRO nutrition whey protein. Whey Protein Isolate powder contains protein in each serving which triggers the synthesis of new muscle tissues and boosts muscle recovery.
      • NO ADDED JUNK: Platinum Whey Protein from NAKPRO doesn’t contain any added sugar or trans-fat. Platinum Whey Protein Isolate is the primary source of protein in the product.
      • REFRESHING FLAVORS: Fulfil your protein intake with NAKPRO Platinum Whey Protein Isolate for muscle growth and post-workout recovery in scrumptious flavors like Banana, Chocolate, Cookies and Cream, Coffee, Cream Chocolate, Mango, Strawberry, Vanilla and Malai Kulfi. Taste with the goodness of protein to conquer fitness goals with ease.
      • COST-EFFECTIVE: Start your fitness journey with NAKPRO Platinum whey protein powder for beginners without lightening your wallet. It is the perfect health supplement for gym newbies as it cost-effective and worthwhile.
      • SUPPORTS MUSCLE HEALTH AS WE AGE: As we age, it’s important to consume high quality complete proteins, like Platinum Whey to help support optimal muscle health. Specially formulated for bodybuilders, weight training athletes, fitness champions and gym enthusiasts, build lean muscles, boost recovery, and reduce muscle loss.

      Next page

      From the brand

      Previous page

      2. Nakpro Nutrition is and fastest-growing manufacturer of sport nutrition brand headquartered in Bengaluru. Our raw materials are globally sourced and trusted by a million of users.

        We are the one-stop brand for all your protein supplement needs. We have wide product range - Whey Protein, Creatine, Gainers, Amino Acid, Casein, Plant Based Protein etc. Our products are high in protein, gluten free, non-GMO & no added sugar.

      3. Best Sellers

      4. New Arrivals

      5. Whey Protein

      6. Gainers

      7. Amino Acid

      8. Casein & Plant Protein

      9. NAKPRO Mission

        Nakpro is on a mission to drive India's most comprehensive virtual business that helps customers make informed choices and extract the best value for their money.

        Are our products high quality?

        At NAKPRO Nutrition our vision is to help support your health and fitness goals by sourcing premium high-quality ingredients after wide research and quality check so that you get only high-quality protein into your body.

      Next page

      Product Description

      Nakpro is India's most economical and fastest-growing sports supplement brand, dedicated to helping customers save both time and money. Nakpro provides a platform where fitness enthusiasts can access premium protein products at highly competitive prices.

      Driven by a mission to empower consumers, Nakpro simplifies the journey of choosing the right supplements while ensuring maximum value. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned athlete or a weight lifter, Nakpro is your trusted partner in achieving your fitness goals.

      NAKPRO Platinum Whey Protein Isolate

      Platinum Whey Protein Isolate is essential for Building Body strong, Lean muscles. Whey Protein Isolate contains all the essential amino acids required for growth and maintenance of lean muscle mass. It also provides Branched Chain Amino Acids (Leucine, Isoleucine, Valine) which are vital to maintaining healthy metabolism. This Whey Isolate Protein Powder, a pure protein powder, can help you achieve your fitness goals. Whey Protein Isolate, a protein supplement, is an ideal supplement for athletes, bodybuilders and those looking to increase muscle mass. This Whey Protein Isolate Powder, a Whey Protein Powder, is a fast-digesting protein that helps to rebuild muscle tissue and promote growth.

      FASTER MUSCLE RECOVERY

      NAKPRO Platinum Whey Protein Isolate, ISO Protein Powder, is one of the most quickly absorbed proteins available, making it the perfect choice for Pre workout and Post workout recovery. NAKPRO Platinum Whey Protein Isolate supplement powder delivers 28g of protein per serving 34g serving size, with 6.36g BCAA, 5.08g Glutamine. This Whey Protein Powder, helps to rebuild muscle tissue and promote growth, allowing you to achieve your goals faster. Platinum Whey Protein doesn’t contain any added sugar or trans-fat. Platinum Whey Protein Isolate is the primary source of protein in the product.

      Quality

      NAKPRO Protein Supplements are 100% Genuine, clean product. Laboratory tested and certified for purity. Quality assured and authenticity guaranteed. The quality standards of Nakpro have always been high. Each shake mixes up effortlessly using just a glass and spoon and tastes consistently good, shake after shake.

      Benefits

      NAKRO PLATINUM WHEY PROTEIN ISOLATE is Clean Protein Supplement for your body: Many proteins get that delicious flavor by adding in a ton of sugar. We’ve accomplished that without any added sugar to keep you healthy and safe. Also, NAKPRO Powders are high in protein, Gluten Free, No Artificial colors, Non-GMO, No Banned Substances and No Amino spiking.

      When should you drink whey protein and How to Consume

      Just after waking up in the morning. The pre-workout should take place 30 minutes prior to the gym session. Right after workout: right after exercise. The last thing you need to do before going to bed is to read. Add 180ml - 200ml of water or skimmed milk first to the shaker and then add one heaping scoop (34g) of Platinum whey, mix immediately for 30 seconds for a thick and creamy shake.

      SAFE TO CONSUME

      NAKRO PLATINUM WHEY PROTEIN ISOLATE is Clean Protein Supplement for your body: Many proteins get that delicious flavor by adding in a ton of sugar. We’ve accomplished that without any added sugar to keep you healthy and safe. Also, NAKPRO Powders are high in protein, Gluten Free, No Artificial colors, Non-GMO, No Banned Substances and No Amino spiking.

      Focus on your Goal

      NAKPRO PROTEIN POWDER’S is our commitment to helping you to feel and perform at your highest level – built a quality and proven by results, without compromise. You deserve protein supplements that help you to reach your full potential, and you should have peace of mind knowing they are safe to preserve.

      Product guides and documents

      Certificate of Analysis (PDF)

      Important information

      Ingredients:

      Whey Protein Isolate

      Directions:

      Mix 1 Heaping Scoop (34g) of Nakpro Platinum Whey Isolate in 200ml water/Skimmed milk/any other beverage of your choice. Shake the Protein in Shaker bottle for 10-30 Seconds. Shake well, dissolve and drink.

      Legal Disclaimer:

      While we work to ensure that product information is correct, on occasion manufacturers may alter their ingredient lists. Actual product packaging and materials may contain more and/or different information than that shown on our web site. We recommend that you do not solely rely on the information presented and that you always read labels, warnings, and directions before using or consuming a product. For additional information about a product, please contact the manufacturer.

      How are ratings calculated?
      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Customers say

      Customers find this whey protein isolate to be of high quality, with 29 grams of protein per scoop and easy mixing with water or milk. They appreciate its effectiveness for muscle growth and recovery after workouts, and consider it good value for money. While some customers report no digestive issues, others experience bloating. The taste receives mixed feedback, with some finding it super tasty while others say it's too sweet.

      Top reviews from India

      • Arvind
        5 out of 5 stars
        Best cheapest protein available in Indian market
        Reviewed in India on 20 July 2024
        Flavour Name: ChocolateSize: 1000 g (Pack of 1)
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I'm absolutely loving Nakpro Whey Protein! I've tried several protein powders in the past, but this one stands out from the rest. Here's why:

        - High-quality protein: Nakpro Whey Protein is made from pure, grass-fed whey protein that's rich in essential amino acids.

        - Great taste: I've tried the chocolate and mango flavors, and both are delicious and mix easily with water or milk.

        - No fillers or additives: I appreciate that Nakpro keeps their formula clean and simple, without any artificial flavors, sweeteners, or preservatives.

        - Excellent absorption: I've noticed that my body absorbs the protein quickly and efficiently, which helps with muscle recovery after workouts.

        - Affordable: Nakpro offers great value for the price, especially considering the high-quality ingredients.

        Overall, I'm thoroughly impressed with Nakpro Whey Protein and would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a reliable and effective protein supplement.

      • Himanshu Sahni
        5 out of 5 stars
        5-Star Review for Nakpro Whey Protein Isolate
        Reviewed in India on 5 August 2024
        Flavour Name: ChocolateSize: 1000 g (Pack of 1)
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I've been using Nakpro Whey Protein Isolate for the past 2-3 years, and it has consistently exceeded my expectations. The quality is top-notch, with a high protein content that supports my fitness goals perfectly. It's incredibly easy to mix, and the taste is excellent—no chalky aftertaste like some other brands I've tried. The product is gentle on my stomach and doesn't cause any bloating, which is a huge plus.

        Nakpro Whey Protein Isolate has been a reliable part of my daily routine, helping me recover faster after workouts and build lean muscle. The packaging is convenient, keeping the powder fresh and easy to store.

        Overall, this protein powder offers excellent value for money. I highly recommend Nakpro Whey Protein Isolate to anyone looking for a high-quality, effective protein supplement.

      • Joydeep Ghosh
        5 out of 5 stars
        A Game-Changer in Every Scoop!
        Reviewed in India on 9 October 2023
        Flavour Name: ChocolateSize: 1000 g (Pack of 1)
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I've tried my fair share of whey protein powders, but this one has truly exceeded my expectations in every way possible!

        Let's start with the bang for your buck—this product is a steal! The value for money is off the charts. You get a generous amount of high-quality whey protein without breaking the bank. It's like a goldmine for fitness enthusiasts on a budget.

        Now, onto the taste. Oh, where do I even begin? Unlike some other protein powders that leave you cringing with every sip, this one is a delight to the taste buds. It's like having a guilt-free dessert after every workout. The flavor is rich, smooth, and incredibly satisfying. I actually look forward to my post-workout shake—it's that good!

        And let's not forget the star of the show—protein content. If you're serious about your gains, you'll appreciate the high protein amount packed into each serving. It's a protein powerhouse! I've noticed a significant difference in my muscle recovery and overall performance since incorporating this into my routine.

        In summary, this whey protein powder is a game-changer. It's the triple threat of value, taste, and protein content. If you're looking for a protein powder that won't empty your wallet, tastes amazing, and delivers on the protein front, look no further. This is hands down the best bang for your buck in the world of whey protein!
